conventions_testing_870510452083.content: Async tests in this codebase use vi.useFakeTimers() with vi.fn() for controlling timing in describe/it blocks.

conventions_srcvalidationcomposets_87051.content: Validator chains short-circuit on first failure and no-op on empty input — reuse this pattern in src/validation/compose.ts.

facts_srcutilsretryqueuets_870513149951.content: Track merged branches via a _mergedBranches Set in the retry-queue; expose skipMerged/unskipMerged/isMerged methods rather than mutating queue items.

thoughts_srcvalidationcomposets_10477793.content: New public APIs (`composeWithSkip`, `skipMerged`) were unit-tested but never wired to any production call site — integration must be verified explicitly.

facts_testing_1047780770666.content: Unit tests alone are insufficient; a feature needs at least one integration test showing it wired to an actual production code path.

facts_srcutilsretryqueuets_1047782202080.content: Extended existing `retry-queue.ts` with `skipMerged`/`isMerged`/`unskipMerged` rather than creating a new module, keeping state co-located with the queue logic.

conventions_compose_retry_1047783745424.content: Branches are identified by target ID; `skipMerged` uses a `Set<string>` keyed on target ID to track which branches have been merged.
